authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
U.S. Geological Survey (Geographic Names Information System)

sources.title: 14 CCR §7.40(b)(91) — San Juan Creek main stem (Orange Co.)
sources.quotedText: (91) San Juan Creek main stem (Orange Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 273492, "San Juan Creek", Stream, Orange/Riverside Cos., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":273492,"gaz_name":"San Juan Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Orange","objectid_1":1266750}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13100486.7251, 3956748.4031) converts to lon -117.683675, lat 33.461699, at the creek's mouth at Doheny State Beach, Dana Point (matches Wikipedia's mouth location ~33.461°N 117.684°W); corrects the file's prior coordinate (-117.6628, 33.5013), which was ~4.8 km upstream/inland and did not match any GNIS-recorded point for this feature.

parameters.note: San Juan Creek main stem is closed to all fishing statewide, consistent with protection of endangered Southern California steelhead (Oncorhynchus mykiss), which still occasionally use the lower watershed.

regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
